body.title: Add worker field to cc_queue ticket schema
body.result: worker field (igor|claude), needs_review status, set-worker and needs-review commands added to cc_queue. 567 tests pass.
body.description: Add worker field to cc_queue JSON (worker: igor|claude, default claude). cc_queue list/show displays it. PROC_WORK_TICKET queries for unclaimed worker=igor tickets. Small schema addition, no breaking change.
